differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML) - granule cell neuronopathy (GCN)
Neurolymphomatosis or leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid for JC virus PCR (specifically testing for granule cell neuronopathy)
Perform CSF PCR for VZV, HHV-6, EBV, and HSV-1/2
Order a comprehensive paraneoplastic antibody panel (serum and CSF)
Perform an urgent brain MRI with dedicated sequences for rhombencephalitis and leptomeningeal disease enhancement
Consider brain/cerebellar biopsy if infectious workup remains negative and clinical decline persists
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and oncology specialists to discuss potential diagnostic neurosurgical intervention
